title: Jamaican Coconut Stir Fry
description: A tropical and flavorful stir fry made with jamaican spices, coconut, and your choice of protein. Serve over rice or noodles for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add coconut, jerk seasoning, brown sugar, and lime juice. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional coconut and lime wedges, if desired.
